steps.title: Read the civic clue
steps.content: The passage says Demosthenes characterized parrhesia as the foundation of democracy rather than merely as a facilitator of the political system. The blank must describe someone who publicly supports or champions parrhesia.

steps.title: Reject the mismatched roles
steps.content: Choice B suggests a caretaker, not an advocate. Choice C suggests a learner in training, and choice D suggests a forerunner or signal of something to come. The remaining phrase means an advocate or supporter of an idea, which fits Demosthenes' public praise of parrhesia. The answer is A.
